calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-14-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 to Place a Settlement on the record.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

James B. Sutherland, Esq., appearing Plaintiff David Noguera.
Plaintiff David Noguera sworn and examined through Spanish Interpreter Karla White.
Richard E. McGreevy, Esq., appearing for Defendant Fredy Alex Amaya.
Defendant Fredy Alex Amaya sworn and examined through Spanish Interpreter Spanish Jerold Tablada.
Case has settled. Terms and conditions of settlement read into the record.
Defendant agrees to pay $6,000.00 to plaintiff. Plaintiff will file dismissal with prejudice of all claims within 30 days.
Court ordered matter scheduled for an Order to Show Cause pursuant to California Rules of Court CRC 3.1385 on April 14, 2015 at 10:30 AM, in Department 514.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Responses To Special Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
